title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
titleCn: 寻找旋转排序数组中的最小值

testcases.input: nums = [3,4,5,1,2] Output: 1 Explanation: The original array was [1,2,3,4,5] rotated 3 times.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The original array was [1,2,3,4,5] rotated 3 times.

testcases.input: nums = [4,5,6,7,0,1,2] Output: 0 Explanation: The original array was [0,1,2,4,5,6,7] and it was rotated 4 times.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The original array was [0,1,2,4,5,6,7] and it was rotated 4 times.

testcases.input: nums = [11,13,15,17] Output: 11 Explanation: The original array was [11,13,15,17] and it was rotated 4 times.
testcases.expectedOutput: 11 Explanation: The original array was [11,13,15,17] and it was rotated 4 times.
